mapper.select:
select
from bus_comment
and content like concat('%', #{content}, '%')
order by id desc

select comment.*, user.avatar, user.user_name as userName, u2.user_name as replyUser from bus_comment comment left join front_user user on comment.user_id = user.user_id left join bus_comment c2 on comment.pid = c2.id left join front_user u2 on c2.user_id = u2.user_id where comment.fid = #{fid} and comment.module = #{module} and comment.pid is null order by comment.id asc

select comment.*, user.avatar, user.user_name as userName, u2.user_name as replyUser from bus_comment comment left join front_user user on comment.user_id = user.user_id left join bus_comment c2 on comment.pid = c2.id left join front_user u2 on c2.user_id = u2.user_id where comment.fid = #{fid} and comment.module = #{module} order by comment.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into bus_comment
id, content, user_id, pid, root_id, time, fid, module,
#{id}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{pid}, #{rootId}, #{time}, #{fid}, #{module},
mapper.update:
update bus_comment
content = #{content},
user_id = #{userId},
pid = #{pid},
root_id = #{rootId},
time = #{time},
fid = #{fid},
module = #{module},
where id = #{id}
